id=docs-artifact-glob-directory
source=docs
mode=supported
kind=run
url=https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact/blob/main/README.md
docs_urls=https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact/blob/main/README.md,https://github.com/actions/download-artifact/blob/main/README.md
added_at=2026-03-13
notes=upload-artifact preserves directory contents for directory paths and preserves hierarchy after the first wildcard; download-artifact without name downloads all artifacts into named directories
